items.name: Blue Neon Glowing Top Hat
items.description:
This Top Hat features a brightblue color with a smooth surface and a thin white band wrapped neatly around the base of the Hat, adding it a sleek and elegant contrast to the vibrant blue.

Pro Tip: Is the Item too small? Too big? Bad Positioned?
Use Robloxs Accessory Adjustment mode!

Find more Top Hats here:
https://www.roblox.com/catalog?Keyword=top+hat&Category=1&CreatorName=Accessory+Roulette&salesTypeFilter=1
